faculty: UCD Michael Smurfit Graduate Business School
tuition: EUR 26,180 (non-EU, full-time, academic year 2026/2027)

requirements.undergrad_background: Minimum second class honours primary degree (or equivalent) including quantitative techniques (Engineering, Computer Science, other Sciences); Business studies background applicants need MIS/Maths/other quantitative coursework
requirements.gmat_gre: May be asked to undertake the GMAT or GRE at the Director's discretion (not always required)
requirements.prerequisites: Quantitative coursework required if from a business studies background

deadlines.notes: 官网明确说明：申请采用滚动录取(rolling basis)，名额招满即关闭申请，建议尽早申请；部分奖学金可能有单独的截止日期。

notes: 申请材料含两篇约300字的essay问答（非传统单一motivation letter形式）。UCD校友申请可享5%学费减免。EU学费为EUR 17,750/年(2026/2027)。IELTS/TOEFL具体分数需查看英语语言要求专页(未能直接核实数值)。
